case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES OF SO. CA INC., BDC VS RUIZ, ANNE F.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANNE F. HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-1996 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, NOT ICE OF HEARING AND NOTICE OF OPPOSITION.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAR-20-1996, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANNE F.
ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AVCO'S EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER IS WITHDRAWN AT AVCO'S REQUEST. PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO A PAYMENT PLAIN AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT/DEBTOR RUIZ TO PAY $30 PER MONTH BEGINNING 4/22/96 PAYMENTS DUE BY THE 22ND OF EACH MONTH.
MOTION RECONSIDERATION ON WITHHOLDING ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES OF SO. CA INC., BDC HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS FOR 11:00AM NOT 8:30AM.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION ON WITHHOLDING ORDER OF APR-22-1996, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES OF SO. CA INC., BDC AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANNE F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1988 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANNE F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES OF SO. CA INC., BDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANNE F. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,542.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
